analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with varying levels of completion. The docs folder appears to be the most relevant for implementing a black hole theme with animated slides and pages. The current HTML structure in docs/index.html is minimal and lacks the necessary sections for black holes content. The styles.css file needs to be updated with cosmic-themed colors, animations, and visual effects. The script.js file should be enhanced to handle slide animations and page transitions.

improvements.description: Implement a cosmic black hole theme with dark backgrounds, swirling animations, glowing elements, and gradient effects to create an immersive space experience.
Add structured sections for black holes content including introduction, formation, types, effects, and interactive animated slides with smooth transitions.
Enhance the script to handle animated slide transitions, page navigation, and interactive elements with smooth animations and user-friendly interactions.
